markdownRemark.html:
• You can utilize gatsby.config.js to put in lots of cool plugins

    • Some plugins are good for using APIs to pull in data from different sources
    • GitHub plugin: gatsby-source-graphql
    • Example:
    • { resolve: 'gatsby-source-graphql', options: { typeName: 'GitHub', fieldName: 'github', url: 'https://api.github.com/graphql', headers: { Authorization:bearer ${process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN}, }, fetchOptions: {}, }
